DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CHRISTIANE HAYASHI'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - THE COURT DENIES THE ANTI-SLAPP MOTION AS MOOT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DISMISSED THE ACTION. THE COURT CONCLUDES THAT THE COMPLAINT IS A SLAPP AND AWARDS $5,637.50 IN FEES TO DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR NO. 119118

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CHRISTIANE HAYASHI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS
Off calendar per dismissal of complaint filed on June 6, 2012. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEILA MONGAN, TEL. NO. 554-3915 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CHRISTIANE HAYASHI'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - The Court denies the anti-SLAPP motion as moot because plaintiff dismissed the action. The Court concludes that the complaint is a SLAPP and awards $5,637.50 in fees to defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)
